_comments: enableCauldronFormula: Enable or disable the cauldron functionality.
formulaItems: List of items required for the cauldron formula.
firstLogAcquisitionChance: Percentage chance for acquiring the power on first login: 0 to 100.
generalGlowingEffect: Enables the glowing effect on entities affected by telekinesis.
hidenEntityGlowingEffect: Enables the glowing effect on entities hidden by a block during telekinesis.
powerToReplace: Defines the power that will be replaced: packID:powerID
